latest_articles.title: Pope Leo heads to Monaco 488 years after the last papal visit
latest_articles.summary: Decision to choose small, wealthy – but very Catholic – state for first European trip has baffled some Vatican observersPope Leo will travel to Monaco, the semi-enclave famous for casinos and superyachts, on Saturday on…
latest_articles.evidence: Pope Leo heads to Monaco 488 years after the last papal visit
